title: T-081 — Technical release adapter for NPD T-097 canonical release model
prompt:
# T-081 — Technical release adapter for NPD T-097 canonical release model

Implement Technical adapters only for the canonical release model owned by 01-NPD T-097. Do not create a competing shared/Technical release enum. Discovery is mandatory: inspect the NPD release contract produced by `_meta/atomic-tasks/01-npd/tasks/T-097.json` and the implementation files it names, then bind Technical factory_specs and shared BOM headers to that canonical status/transition model.

Technical adapter responsibilities: map canonical statuses to Technical factory-use labels/actions, expose typed guards for factory_specs and BOM bundle approval, keep D365 sync status separate, enforce released-record immutability/clone-on-write, and return badge metadata/blocking reason codes for UI tasks. Initial factory_spec created by NPD Builder starts `in_review`; NPD G4 closes NPD, while Technical factory_spec+BOM approval unlocks factory use.

RED first: illegal transitions, direct edits to released records, accidental D365 gating, and duplicate local enum creation must fail deterministically.

pipeline_inputs.description: Technical adapters for the NPD-owned canonical release model; no competing Technical release model.
pipeline_inputs.details: NPD T-097 is canonical. This task imports/uses that model and adds Technical adapter functions for factory_specs and shared BOM bundle approval only. If the canonical implementation is not yet present, stop with a clear blocker referencing 01-npd/T-097 rather than inventing a fallback enum.
acceptance_criteria: Given canonical NPD T-097 release model exists, Technical adapters import/use it and no duplicate Technical/shared release enum is introduced.
Given factory_spec is created from NPD Builder, adapter maps initial canonical status to `in_review` and visible pending factory availability.
Given Technical approves factory_spec+BOM bundle, adapter maps canonical status to factory-usable approved/released UI state without changing D365 sync status.
Given released/approved_for_factory record receives direct update attempt, guard returns RELEASED_RECORD_IMMUTABLE and requires clone-on-write.
Given UI asks for badge metadata, adapter returns stable label, color token, allowed actions and blocking reason codes.
test_strategy: RED tests for adapter import/mapping to NPD T-097 canonical model.
RED tests for illegal transitions, clone-on-write and D365 independence.
risk_red_lines: Do not create a competing release enum/model in Technical.
Do not conflate local release status with D365 sync status.
Do not treat NPD G4 as factory-use approval; Technical approval remains required.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Canonical release model owner; Technical T-081 is adapter only.
